notes.body: Saved after a strong first pass. Need to tailor the resume to emphasize product ownership and TypeScript depth.
Sent application through the company site and highlighted recent work on local-first UX and accessibility.
Application submitted after reaching out to a recruiter on LinkedIn. Waiting to hear back.
Received a polite rejection email. Feedback suggested they preferred deeper marketplace or domain-specific experience.
Preparing for next-round interview with examples around performance, accessibility, and shipping across ambiguity.
Interesting role because of the design systems angle. Follow up once the current interview cycle cools down.
Verbal offer received. Need to compare scope, remote flexibility, and growth path before responding.
Sent application through the company site and highlighted recent work on local-first UX and accessibility.
Closed by recruiter after team reprioritized the opening.
Recruiter screen went well. They are especially interested in frontend architecture decisions and collaboration style.
Looks promising, but worth researching the team setup and whether relocation is expected.
